summary: Iteration 65 - All features verified: Stoked tab role-based access, locked placeholder for regular Surfers, unlocked Stoked for Grom/Comp/Pro, TheInsideHub gear goal tracker, ImpactDashboard 'Athlete Stoke Generated' section, navigation renamed to 'Impacted' for photographers. All tests PASS.

sidebar_locked_stoked_for_surfer.details: Regular Surfer sees 'Stoked' with 'Compete to unlock' text and lock icon. data-testid='nav-stoked-locked' works correctly.

sidebar_unlocked_stoked_for_competitive.details: Grom, Comp Surfer, Pro roles see unlocked Stoked tab with yellow highlight. data-testid='nav-stoked' works correctly.

bottomnav_locked_for_surfer.details: Regular Surfer sees 'Locked' in mobile bottom nav with lock icon. data-testid='bottomnav-locked-locked' found.

bottomnav_unlocked_for_competitive.details: Comp Surfer sees 'Peak' and 'Stoked' tabs in bottom nav. Both data-testid='bottomnav-peak' and 'bottomnav-stoked' found.

stoked_locked_page.details: StokedLockedPage shows 'Stoked is Locked' title, 'How to Unlock' section with 3 steps (Compete in Events, Log Competition Results, Unlock Stoked), 'Start Competing' CTA, and benefits preview.

stoked_dashboard_non_extractable.details: Stoked Credit Balance shows 'NON-CASH' badge, '$0.00' balance, and spend options: Gear, Sessions, Travel. Text confirms 'Stoked credits help fund your surf career without cash withdrawal'.

the_inside_hub_gear_tracker.details: Gear Goal Tracker visible for Grom with 'New Shortboard' target ($450), progress bar, '$0 saved', 'Credits from: Photographer Sponsors', and 'Browse Gear Hub' button.

impacted_route.details: Route /impacted works and shows ImpactDashboard component.

impact_dashboard_athlete_stoke.details: 'Athlete Stoke Generated' section visible with 'YOUR IMPACT' badge, shows 'Total Credits Given', 'Athletes Supported', 'You helped Groms earn $X in gear credits this month', and 'Sponsor More Athletes' CTA.

photographer_impacted_navigation.details: Photographer role sees 'Impacted' in sidebar navigation (renamed from 'Impact'). data-testid='nav-impacted' works correctly.

god_mode_persona_switcher.details: God Mode Persona Switcher allows switching between roles (Surfer, Grom, Comp Surfer, Photographer). Cyan banner shows 'VIEWING AS: [ROLE]' with EXIT button.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stoked tab access features working correctly. Role-based navigation verified: Regular Surfer sees locked Stoked, Grom/Comp/Pro see unlocked Stoked. TheInsideHub has gear goal tracker. ImpactDashboard has 'Athlete Stoke Generated' section. Navigation renamed to 'Impacted' for photographers.

07_surfer_sidebar.png - Sidebar showing locked Stoked with 'Compete to unlock'
13_mobile_bottomnav_surfer.png - Mobile bottom nav with 'Locked' for Surfer
15_mobile_comp_surfer.png - Mobile bottom nav with 'Peak' and 'Stoked' for Comp Surfer
